title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Cars24 South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Cars24 South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
